info.name: Marketplace API
info.description: Full Marketplace API — all modules. Auto-generated by api-collections/merge.py. Do not edit manually.

variable.description: Order ID for SOT tests — auto-saved by Setup, or set manually
Payment ID in DB — auto-saved by Setup: Initiate Payment
gateway_ref / external_id for webhook payloads — auto-saved by Setup: Initiate Payment

request.description: Laravel health check endpoint. Returns 200 jika server UP.

item.name: 00. Media (File Upload)
item.description:
Upload file ke Cloudflare R2 via Presigned URL (client-side direct upload)

**Flow:**
1. `POST /api/media/presigned-url` → dapat `upload_url` + `key`
2. `PUT {upload_url}` dari client langsung ke R2 (tidak melalui server)
3. `POST /api/media/confirm` dengan `key` → konfirmasi upload

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Generate presigned PUT URL untuk upload langsung ke Cloudflare R2.

**folder** options: `avatars`, `store-assets`, `products`, `reviews`, `kyc-documents`

**mime** options: `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp`, `image/gif`, `video/mp4`, `application/pdf`

URL yang dihasilkan valid selama 300 detik (5 menit).

response.name: 422 Invalid Folder

request.description:
Upload file langsung ke Cloudflare R2 menggunakan presigned URL dari step sebelumnya.

⚠️ Request ini dikirim LANGSUNG ke R2 — tidak melalui server Laravel.
⚠️ `Content-Type` harus sama persis dengan `mime` yang didaftarkan saat generate presigned URL.
⚠️ Tidak butuh Authorization header.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Konfirmasi bahwa file sudah berhasil di-upload ke R2.
Backend akan validasi file exists di R2, hapus upload session dari Redis, dan return public URL.

response.name: 422 File Not Found

request.description:
Hapus file dari Cloudflare R2.

Return 204 No Content (tanpa body).

⚠️ URL ini di-generate otomatis oleh backend dan dikirim ke email user saat register.
⚠️ URL valid selama 60 menit.

⚠️ Hanya berhasil jika email belum terverifikasi.

⚠️ Selalu return 200 meskipun email tidak ditemukan (mencegah email enumeration).

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Reset password menggunakan token dari email.

`token` didapat dari link di email Forgot Password.
Setelah reset, semua access token dan refresh token di-revoke.

Ubah password untuk user yang sedang login.

Membutuhkan `current_password` untuk verifikasi.
Setelah berhasil, semua sesi lain (kecuali sesi aktif) akan di-revoke.

Tampilkan daftar refresh token aktif (sesi yang belum expired dan belum di-revoke).

ID sesi pertama otomatis tersimpan ke `session_id` untuk request Revoke Session.

Revoke (logout) satu sesi spesifik berdasarkan ID refresh token.

ID sesi didapat dari endpoint List Active Sessions.
Hanya bisa revoke sesi milik user yang sedang login.

item.name: 02. User Profile
item.description:
User profile management — GET/PUT profile, avatar upload, address book CRUD, phone verification via OTP.

Semua endpoint membutuhkan Bearer token 🔒

**Avatar upload flow:**
1. `POST /users/me/avatar` → dapat `avatar_upload_url` + `avatar_key`
2. `PUT {{avatar_upload_url}}` langsung ke R2 (tidak melalui server)
3. `POST /users/me/avatar/confirm` → simpan key ke DB

**Phone verification flow:**
1. `POST /users/phone/send-otp` → OTP dikirim via WA/SMS
2. `POST /users/phone/verify` → verifikasi OTP → phone tersimpan

request.description:
Ambil full profile user yang sedang login.

Berbeda dari `GET /api/auth/me` (hanya basic fields) — endpoint ini return semua field profil termasuk `phone`, `bio`, `avatar`, `phone_verified_at`.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Update profile user.

⚠️ Field `phone` tidak dapat diubah melalui endpoint ini — gunakan flow `/phone/send-otp` + `/phone/verify`.
⚠️ Semua field bersifat `sometimes` (partial update).

response.name: 200 OK
422 Phone Field Prohibited

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
// Mirror to shared media_upload_url so "Upload File ke R2" request works universally

request.description:
Step 1: Generate presigned URL untuk upload foto profil ke Cloudflare R2.

**mime** options: `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp` (PDF/video tidak diizinkan)

`avatar_upload_url` dan `avatar_key` otomatis tersimpan ke collection variables.

response.name: 422 Invalid MIME

request.description:
Step 2: Upload file foto profil langsung ke Cloudflare R2 menggunakan presigned URL.

⚠️ Request dikirim LANGSUNG ke R2 — tidak melalui server Laravel.
⚠️ `Content-Type` harus sama dengan `mime` yang dipakai saat generate presigned URL.
⚠️ Tidak butuh Authorization header.
⚠️ Client wajib resize gambar ke maks 500×500px sebelum upload.
Step 3: Konfirmasi upload avatar berhasil. Backend validasi file exists di R2 dan update `users.avatar`.

response.name: 200 OK
422 File Not Found

request.description:
Kirim OTP 6 digit ke nomor HP via WhatsApp/SMS.

Nomor HP dinormalisasi ke format E.164 secara otomatis:
- `081234567890` → `+6281234567890`
- `+6281234567890` → `+6281234567890`

⚠️ Rate limit: maks 3 request per 10 menit untuk satu nomor HP.

response.name: 200 OK
422 Phone Already Taken
429 Rate Limited

request.description:
Verifikasi OTP untuk nomor HP. Setelah berhasil, `users.phone` dan `users.phone_verified_at` diupdate.

⚠️ Maks 5 percobaan salah sebelum OTP diinvalidasi.
⚠️ OTP valid selama 5 menit.

response.name: 200 OK
422 OTP Expired
422 OTP Max Retry

item.name: 04. Product
item.description:
Product Catalog — Categories, Products (CRUD), Variants, dan Media (Presigned Upload).

**Flow Media Upload:**
1. `POST /api/merchant/products/{product}/media` → dapat `upload_url` + `key` (tersimpan ke `media_upload_url` dan `media_key`)
2. `PUT {{media_upload_url}}` (folder Media > Upload File ke R2) — kirim langsung ke R2
3. `POST /api/merchant/products/{product}/media/confirm` dengan `key: {{media_key}}` — simpan ke DB

request.description:
Mengembalikan seluruh category tree secara nested (3 level). Di-cache Redis TTL 3600s.

Response `data` adalah array of root categories, masing-masing dengan field `children`.
Ambil satu category beserta `children` langsung (1 level ke bawah). Ganti `elektronik` dengan slug yang sesuai.
Admin only. Membuat root category (level 1). Tambahkan `parent_id` untuk membuat child category — level dihitung otomatis dari parent.

request.description: Admin only. Update category berdasarkan slug. Semua field bersifat optional (`sometimes`). Jika `slug` diubah, cache lama dan baru sama-sama di-invalidate.

request.description:
Generate presigned URL untuk upload foto/video produk langsung ke Cloudflare R2.

**mime** options: `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp`, `video/mp4`

`media_upload_url` dan `media_key` otomatis tersimpan ke collection variables.

**Upload flow:**
1. ✅ Request ini → dapat `upload_url` + `key`
2. 🔼 PUT ke `{{media_upload_url}}` (gunakan "Upload File ke R2" di folder Media)
3. ✅ Confirm via Step 3

Upload file LANGSUNG ke Cloudflare R2 menggunakan presigned URL dari Step 1.

⚠️ Request ini dikirim LANGSUNG ke R2 — tidak melalui server Laravel.
⚠️ `Content-Type` harus sama dengan `mime` yang dipakai di Step 1.
⚠️ Tidak perlu Authorization header.

**Body:** pilih mode `File` dan select file dari disk.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes

request.description:
Konfirmasi upload selesai. Server memverifikasi file ada di R2 lalu menyimpan record ke DB.

`key` otomatis terisi dari `{{media_key}}` yang disimpan di Step 1.

Media pertama pada produk ini otomatis di-set sebagai `is_primary: true`.

`product_media_id` tersimpan ke collection variable untuk kebutuhan delete/reorder.

Atur ulang urutan tampilan foto produk.

Server memvalidasi bahwa semua `id` yang dikirim benar-benar milik produk ini (IDOR protection).

Hapus media: file dihapus dari R2, record dihapus dari DB.

Jika media yang dihapus adalah `is_primary`, media berikutnya otomatis jadi primary.

Returns 204 No Content.

⚙️ Observer otomatis re-sync `total_stock`, `min_price`, `max_price` setelah update.

request.description:
Add a product to wishlist.

`product_id` (bukan variant_id) — buyer belum pilih ukuran/warna.

**`{{wishlist_product_id}}`** otomatis terisi saat:
- `GET /api/products` (List Products) → ambil produk pertama
- `GET /api/products/{slug}` (Get Product Detail) → ambil produk yang sedang dilihat

request.description:
Buat order dari cart items. Satu entri `items[]` = satu toko = satu Order.

**`item_ids` (optional):** Array ID cart_item spesifik yang ingin di-checkout dari toko ini. Jika tidak disertakan / null → semua item dari toko tersebut di-checkout sekaligus.

**Contoh partial checkout** (3 item di toko, hanya checkout item ke-3):
```json
{ "store_id": 1, "item_ids": [42] }
```

Item yang tidak di-checkout **tetap di cart** (tidak dihapus).

**Selalu sertakan `X-Idempotency-Key`** header (UUID) untuk mencegah double order.

`shipping_fee` diterima as-is (Sprint 8 akan tambah re-validasi backend via ShippingService).

item.name: 07. Payment
item.description: Module 7 — Payment: gateway charges, wallet, and refunds

item.name: Payment
item.description: Initiate & manage payments via Xendit Invoice / Midtrans Snap

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
request: { body: { get raw() { return JSON.stringify(req.getBody()); } } }
// Auto-generate fresh GUID for X-Idempotency-Key on every request
// Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

header.description: Unique key per request — prevents double payment

request.description:
Buat gateway charge dan Payment record.

**Selalu sertakan `X-Idempotency-Key`** (UUID) untuk mencegah double charge.

**gateway** options:
- `xendit` → Xendit Invoice hosted checkout (VA, QRIS, e-wallet, card semua tersedia di halaman invoice)
- `midtrans` → Midtrans Snap hosted checkout

Method diassign otomatis oleh server: `xendit` → `invoice`, `midtrans` → `snap`.

User akan diarahkan ke `redirect_url` untuk menyelesaikan pembayaran. Webhook otomatis mengupdate status saat pembayaran selesai.

`amount` stored as integer cents.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable — Order Not Owned

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Poll status pembayaran. Frontend menggunakan ini untuk mendeteksi saat pembayaran Invoice/Snap selesai.

Returns Payment dengan relasi order dan transaction.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Ganti gateway pembayaran untuk payment yang sedang **pending**.

Mekanisme:
1. Expire invoice/snap lama di gateway (best-effort — tidak gagal jika sudah expire)
2. Payment lama → status `expired`
3. Buat gateway charge baru dengan gateway yang diminta
4. Return Payment baru dengan `redirect_url` baru

**Order tidak dibatalkan** — tetap `pending` sampai timer habis.

**Hanya bekerja untuk payment berstatus `pending`.** Paid/expired/refunded → 422.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable — Payment Not Pending

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Request refund untuk payment milik user yang terautentikasi.

- **Paid**: gateway refundPayment() + create Refund record + Payment status → refunded
- **Pending/Expired**: cancel only — no gateway call, Payment status → failed

Hanya buyer pemilik order yang dapat request refund.

item.name: Wallet
item.description: Wallet balance, transactions, top-up and merchant withdrawal

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Ambil saldo wallet user yang terautentikasi.

Wallet dibuat otomatis (`firstOrCreate`) saat pertama kali diakses — tidak perlu inisialisasi manual.

`available_cents = balance_cents - on_hold_cents`

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Riwayat transaksi wallet user (paginated, 20 per page, latest first).

`type`: `credit` (masuk) atau `debit` (keluar)

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Initiate wallet top-up via payment gateway.

Alur: POST ini mengembalikan instruksi untuk melanjutkan ke `POST /api/payments/initiate` dengan jumlah yang sama. Kredit wallet terjadi otomatis via `PaymentCaptured` → `CreditUserWallet` listener setelah pembayaran berhasil.

`amount` dalam integer cents. Min: Rp 10.000 (1000000 cents).

response.name: 200 OK

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Merchant meminta pencairan saldo wallet ke rekening bank.

**Hanya untuk akun Merchant (role=merchant)**. Buyer mendapat 403.

Alur `on_hold`:
1. Withdraw request → `balance -= amount`, `on_hold += amount`
2. Disbursement webhook SUCCESS → `on_hold -= amount` (permanently deducted)
3. Disbursement webhook FAILED → `on_hold -= amount`, `balance += amount` (rollback)

`amount` dalam integer cents. Tidak boleh melebihi `available_cents`.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Sandbox Simulator
item.description:
⚠️ SANDBOX only — simulasi pembayaran untuk memicu webhook ke Laravel.

**Xendit:** API langsung → auto-trigger webhook
**Midtrans:** Buka `snap_redirect_url` di browser → pilih metode → bayar dengan test credentials

Pre-condition: jalankan 'Initiate Payment' dulu — `invoice_id` dan `snap_redirect_url` tersimpan otomatis.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Simulate Xendit Invoice berhasil dibayar di sandbox — **satu klik, tanpa buka browser**.

Xendit akan kirim webhook `status: PAID` ke callback URL → Laravel set payment `paid`.

**Setup (sekali saja):**
1. Isi `xendit_secret_key` di collection variables
2. Set Webhook URL di [Xendit Dashboard](https://dashboard.xendit.co) → Settings → Webhooks → Invoice paid → `https://your-ngrok.io/api/webhooks/xendit`
3. Aktifkan Xendit → Settings → Webhooks → toggle Invoice paid ✅

**Flow per test:**
1. `POST /api/payments/initiate` dengan `gateway: xendit` → `invoice_id` tersimpan otomatis
2. Send request ini → Xendit trigger webhook
3. `GET /api/payments/{{payment_id}}/status` → status harus `paid`

⚠️ **Sandbox only**

**Buka URL ini di browser** untuk masuk ke halaman Snap Midtrans.

`snap_redirect_url` tersimpan otomatis saat kamu jalankan 'Initiate Payment' dengan `gateway: midtrans`.

---

## Test Credentials Midtrans Sandbox

### Kartu Kredit
| Card Number | Type | 3DS |
|---|---|---|
| `4811 1111 1111 1114` | Visa (success) | OTP: `112233` |
| `4911 1111 1111 1113` | Visa (success, no 3DS) | — |
| `4911 1111 1111 1129` | Visa (challenge/fraud) | — |
| `5210 0000 0000 0002` | Mastercard | OTP: `112233` |

CVV: `123` | Exp: `01/25` (masa depan)

### Bank Transfer (VA)
Semua VA di sandbox akan **auto-settle dalam beberapa detik** — tidak perlu aksi manual.

### GoPay
1. Pilih GoPay di Snap
2. Scan QR atau klik deeplink
3. Di sandbox, gunakan test number `+628123456789` dan PIN `123456`

### ShopeePay
Redirect ke halaman ShopeePay sandbox → approve dengan akun sandbox

### QRIS
Scan QR dengan app sandbox QRIS atau konfirmasi manual di dashboard Midtrans

---

## Setelah Bayar

Midtrans akan kirim webhook ke `POST /api/webhooks/midtrans`.

**Setup webhook (sekali saja):**
[Midtrans Dashboard](https://dashboard.sandbox.midtrans.com) → Settings → Configuration
→ **Payment Notification URL:** `https://your-ngrok.io/api/webhooks/midtrans`

Alternatif tanpa browser: gunakan request **'Midtrans — Snap Paid (Settlement)'** di collection `07-webhooks` untuk trigger webhook secara manual.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
request: { body: { get raw() { return JSON.stringify(req.getBody()); } } }
// Compute Midtrans signature: SHA-512(order_id + status_code + gross_amount + server_key)
// Ganti 'midtrans_server_key' di collection variables dengan MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY dari .env
console.warn('⚠️ Set midtrans_server_key in collection variables!');
const input = body.order_id + body.status_code + body.gross_amount + serverKey;
// Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Trigger webhook Midtrans secara manual ke Laravel — **tanpa buka browser, tanpa Midtrans dashboard**.

Cocok untuk development lokal dimana Midtrans tidak bisa reach server kamu.

**Setup:**
1. Isi `midtrans_server_key` di collection variables (dari `.env MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY`)
2. Ganti `order_id` dengan `external_id` dari hasil Initiate Payment (format: `PAY-XXXXX-5`)
3. Ganti `gross_amount` dengan jumlah dalam IDR format string, contoh: `"390000.00"`
4. Pre-request script akan auto-compute `signature_key` → webhook akan lolos verifikasi

**Cara dapat `order_id`:**
Dari response Initiate Payment → `data.payment_details.external_id`

**Cara dapat `gross_amount`:**
Dari `data.amount_cents` dibagi 100, format: `"390000.00"`

**Setelah Send:** `GET /api/payments/{{payment_id}}/status` → status harus `paid`

item.name: 07. Webhooks
item.description:
Module 7 — Webhook endpoints: PUBLIC, no Bearer auth.

**Xendit:** verifikasi via `x-callback-token` header (dibandingkan `XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` di .env)
**Midtrans:** verifikasi via SHA-512 signature di body payload

Semua webhook idempotent — jika payment sudah `paid`/`refunded`, event diabaikan.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Xendit Invoice payment berhasil.

Dikirim Xendit ke Laravel saat buyer selesai bayar di halaman invoice (metode apapun — VA, QRIS, e-wallet, kartu kredit).

**Field penting:**
- `external_id` → harus match `payments.gateway_ref` atau `transactions.external_id`
- `status: PAID` → Laravel set payment → `paid`, dispatch `PaymentCaptured`
- `paid_amount` → amount aktual yang dibayar (dalam IDR, bukan cents)

**Cara pakai:**
1. Ganti `external_id` dengan nilai dari `payment_details.external_id` hasil Initiate Payment
2. Isi `XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` di collection variables
3. Send → cek DB: `payments.status` harus jadi `paid`

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Xendit Invoice expired — buyer tidak bayar sampai batas waktu.

**Cara pakai:**
1. Ganti `external_id` dengan nilai dari `payment_details.external_id`
2. Send → cek DB: `payments.status` harus jadi `expired`

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
request: { body: { get raw() { return JSON.stringify(req.getBody()); } } }
console.warn('midtrans_server_key not set — signature will be invalid');
const input = body.order_id + body.status_code + body.gross_amount + serverKey;
// Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Midtrans Snap payment notification — pembayaran berhasil (settlement).

**Signature auto-computed** oleh pre-request script:
`SHA-512(order_id + status_code + gross_amount + server_key)`

**Pre-condition:**
1. Isi `midtrans_server_key` di collection variables (dari .env `MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY`)
2. Ganti `order_id` dengan `external_id` dari Initiate Payment
3. Sesuaikan `gross_amount` (format: `"390000.00"` — IDR tanpa cents)

`order_id` di Midtrans = `external_id` di tabel `transactions`.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
request: { body: { get raw() { return JSON.stringify(req.getBody()); } } }
const input = body.order_id + body.status_code + body.gross_amount + serverKey;
// Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Midtrans Snap expired — buyer tidak bayar sampai batas waktu.

**Status code untuk expire: `407`** (berbeda dengan settlement `200`)

**Pre-condition:**
1. Isi `midtrans_server_key` di collection variables
2. Ganti `order_id` dan `gross_amount` sesuai transaksi
3. Pre-request script akan auto-compute signature

**Note:** Signature SHA-512 input: `order_id + "407" + gross_amount + serverKey`

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
request: { body: { get raw() { return JSON.stringify(req.getBody()); } } }
const input = body.order_id + body.status_code + body.gross_amount + serverKey;

request.description:
Midtrans credit card capture — `transaction_status: capture` + `fraud_status: accept` → Laravel maps ke `paid`.

Ini format untuk kartu kredit. Debit/VA/GoPay umumnya langsung `settlement` bukan `capture`.

item.name: ▶ SOT Hardening — Test Suite
item.description:
Manual end-to-end test suite untuk verifikasi semua kasus di planning 07b-payment-sot-hardening.

## Cara Pakai

### Prerequisites
1. Docker dev stack running (`docker compose up -d`)
2. DevSeeder sudah jalan (`/devseed` atau `migrate:fresh --seed`)
3. Set collection variables:
   - `XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` → dari `.env XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN`
   - `midtrans_server_key` → dari `.env MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY`
4. Gateway sandbox credentials ada di `.env` (untuk Initiate Payment yang memanggil API gateway)

### Urutan Eksekusi
Jalankan folder **0 · Setup** dulu, lalu jalankan folder test case satu per satu dari atas ke bawah.

### Queue
Pastikan `QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync` di `.env` (development) agar webhook diproses synchronous — efek DB langsung terlihat tanpa menunggu queue worker.

item.name: 0 · Setup
item.description: Jalankan semua request di folder ini berurutan untuk menyiapkan state sebelum test cases.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
Login sebagai buyer `test@example.com` (seeded oleh DevSeeder).

Test script menyimpan `access_token` ke collection variables secara otomatis.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
// external_id is in payment_details — used as webhook external_id field

request.description:
Initiate Xendit payment untuk order yang sudah ada.

**Pre-condition:** Set `sot_order_id` di collection variables dengan ID order yang statusnya `pending`.

**Cara dapatkan order ID:**
1. Jalankan 06-order collection (Login → Add to Cart → Checkout)
2. Atau set manual: buka Postman, klik collection variables, isi `sot_order_id`

Test script menyimpan `sot_payment_id` dan `sot_external_id` untuk dipakai di test cases berikutnya.

**Note:** Request ini memanggil API Xendit untuk membuat invoice. Pastikan `XENDIT_SECRET_KEY` ada di `.env`.

item.name: 1 · Normal Flow
item.description:
Skenario normal: webhook datang, status berubah sesuai, event di-dispatch.

Jalankan [S1] dan [S2] di folder Setup terlebih dahulu.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
// Note: dengan QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync, job sudah diproses sebelum response ini
// Lanjutkan dengan [1A-V] untuk verifikasi DB state

request.description:
**Expected behavior:**
1. WebhookController: verifyWebhook() ✅ → dispatch ProcessWebhookJob → return 200
2. ProcessWebhookJob (sync): parseWebhookPayload() → external_id
3. Dual verification: getPaymentStatus(external_id) → API bilang PAID
4. applyStatusTransition('paid') dengan lockForUpdate()
5. payment.status → `paid`, order.status → `paid`
6. Event PaymentCaptured dispatched → listener kirim OrderConfirmationMail

**Expected response:** `{"success": true, "message": "Webhook received."}`

**Lanjutkan dengan [1A-V] untuk verifikasi.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
pm.test('✅ payment.status = paid (SOT hardening: state changed by dual-verified API status)', () => {

request.description:
Verifikasi bahwa payment status berubah ke `paid` setelah webhook diterima.

**Expected:** `data.status = "paid"`

item.name: 2 · Edge Cases (auto-testable)
item.description:
Kasus edge yang bisa langsung ditest tanpa manipulasi DB manual.

Kasus 2A dan 2B tidak butuh state apapun. Kasus 2C (idempotency) butuh payment yang sudah `paid` — jalankan setelah folder "1 · Normal Flow".

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
pm.test('✅ Invalid signature returns 403 (rejected before queue)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

request.description:
**SOT Hardening: Signature Verification**

Signature check terjadi SYNCHRONOUS di WebhookController sebelum job di-dispatch. Webhook palsu ditolak sebelum masuk queue.

**Expected:** 403 Forbidden — `{"success": false, "message": "Invalid webhook signature."}`

**Bisa ditest tanpa state apapun.** `x-callback-token` sengaja diisi WRONG_TOKEN.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },
pm.test('✅ Unknown external_id returns 200 (silently ignored)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description:
**SOT Hardening: Unknown Payment Handling**

Webhook untuk payment yang tidak ada di DB. Harus diIgnore secara silent — return 200 agar gateway tidak retry terus-menerus.

Dual verification: `findPaymentByExternalId()` return null → return early tanpa memanggil gateway API.

**Expected:** 200 OK — tidak ada state change di DB.

**Bisa ditest tanpa state apapun.** `external_id` tidak ada di DB.

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes

request.description:
**SOT Hardening: Hard-Terminal Idempotency (DB Lock)**

**Pre-condition:** Jalankan [1A] terlebih dahulu — payment sudah berstatus `paid`.

Kirim webhook paid yang sama untuk payment yang SUDAH paid. Sistem harus:
1. `applyStatusTransition()` acquire lockForUpdate()
2. Deteksi `locked.status = Paid` (hard-terminal)
3. Return tanpa perubahan apapun — idempotent

**Expected:** 200 OK — payment tetap `paid`, tidak ada duplicate event.

**Verify:** Jalankan [1A-V] lagi — `status` tetap `paid`, `updated_at` tidak berubah (atau berubah minimal karena lock).

item.name: 4 · Edge Cases (Manual DB Setup)
item.description:
Kasus yang membutuhkan manipulasi state DB secara manual via tinker sebelum mengirim webhook.

Setup dibuat via `php artisan tinker` karena tidak ada endpoint admin untuk override state.

## PENTING: Butuh payment BARU untuk setiap kasus
Setelah menjalankan kasus 3 (expired), payment tersebut sudah expired. Untuk kasus 4A dan 4B butuh payment baru yang berstatus `pending` agar bisa dimanipulasi.

**Setup payment baru:**
1. Buat order baru → Initiate Payment → catat `sot_payment_id` dan `sot_external_id`
2. Jalankan tinker command sesuai kasus

item.name: [4A] Soft-Terminal Recovery — Paid Webhook pada Payment Expired, Order Pending

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
**Skenario: Uang sudah masuk ke gateway, tapi scheduler sudah expire payment secara lokal — order masih pending, bisa di-recover.**

Terjadi ketika: scheduler (ExpireUnpaidPayments) jalan sebelum webhook gateway tiba. Payment di-expire lokal tapi gateway belum expire.

## Manual Setup (jalankan via tinker SEBELUM send request ini)

```bash
docker compose exec app php artisan tinker
```

```php
// Ganti 42 dengan sot_payment_id yang baru
$p = App\Models\Payment::find(42);
$p->update(['status' => App\Enums\PaymentStatus::Expired]);

// Pastikan order masih pending
$o = $p->order;
echo 'Payment status: ' . $p->fresh()->status->value;      // harus: expired
echo 'Order status:   ' . $o->fresh()->status->value;      // harus: pending
```

## Expected Behavior
1. applyStatusTransition() acquire lock
2. Deteksi: `locked.status = Expired` + `apiStatus = paid`
3. `order.status = Pending` → RECOVERY CASE
4. Log::warning 'Paid signal for locally-expired payment — recovering'
5. cancelPendingPaymentsForOrder() → expire any concurrent payments
6. markPaid() → payment.status = `paid`, order.status = `paid`
7. PaymentCaptured event dispatched

## Verify dengan [4A-V]

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
**Expected:** `data.status = "paid"` (recovered dari expired)

Juga cek log Laravel:
```bash
docker compose exec app tail -f storage/logs/laravel.log | grep 'locally-expired'
```
Harus ada: `Paid signal for locally-expired payment — recovering`

pm.test('✅ order.status = paid (recovery successful — order fulfilled)', () => {

item.name: [4B] Double-Charge Detection — Paid Webhook pada Payment Expired, Order Paid

exec: // Compatibility shim — works in Bruno and Postman without changes
response: { code: res.getStatus(), json: () => res.getBody(), text: () => res.getBody(), to: { have: { status: (n) => { expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(n); } } } },

request.description:
**Skenario: User bayar dua kali — sekali via payment A (sudah fulfilled), sekali via payment B yang sudah expired (cancelCharge gagal). Uang payment B harus dikreditkan ke wallet.**

Terjadi ketika: Payment switch dilakukan, cancelCharge() gagal, user bayar ke invoice lama.

## Manual Setup (jalankan via tinker SEBELUM send request ini)

**Butuh payment BARU (bukan dari kasus 4A):**
1. Buat order baru + initiate payment baru → catat payment_id dan external_id baru ke collection variables

```bash
docker compose exec app php artisan tinker
```

```php
// Ganti 43 dengan sot_payment_id baru
$p = App\Models\Payment::find(43);
$p->update(['status' => App\Enums\PaymentStatus::Expired]);

// Set order ke paid (simulasi order sudah fulfilled via payment lain)
$o = $p->order;
$o->update(['status' => App\Enums\OrderStatus::Paid]);

echo 'Payment status: ' . $p->fresh()->status->value;   // harus: expired
echo 'Order status:   ' . $o->fresh()->status->value;   // harus: paid
```

## Expected Behavior
1. applyStatusTransition() acquire lock
2. Deteksi: `locked.status = Expired` + `apiStatus = paid`
3. `order.status = Paid` → DOUBLE CHARGE CASE
4. refundDoubleChargeToWallet(): buat Refund record + credit WalletBalance
5. Log::critical 'Double payment detected — auto-credited user wallet'
6. Payment status TIDAK berubah (tetap expired)

## Verify dengan [4B-V1], [4B-V2], [4B-V3]

pm.test('✅ payment.status = expired (not changed — double-charge handled separately via wallet)', () => {

request.description: **Expected:** `data.status = "expired"` — payment tidak berubah, uang dikreditkan ke wallet bukan disimpan di payment ini.

item.name: 5 · Midtrans Edge Cases
item.description: Kasus Midtrans-specific: pembayaran dengan berbagai transaction_status.

request.description:
**Midtrans `cancel`** → `parseStatusResponse()` maps ke `expired` → `markExpired()`

**Mapping di `parseStatusResponse()`:**
- `cancel` → `expired`
- `expire` → `expired`
- `deny`   → `expired`

**Pre-condition:** Set `sot_external_id` ke `order_id` Midtrans (sama dengan `external_id` di transactions table).

pm.test('✅ Midtrans deny webhook returns 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description:
Midtrans `deny` — kartu ditolak bank/issuer.

**Mapping:** `deny` → `expired` (dalam konteks marketplace, deny sama dengan expired — buyer harus retry dengan metode lain).

request.description:
Midtrans `pending` — user sedang proses di ATM/bank, menunggu konfirmasi.

Ini informational callback — tidak ada state change. Payment tetap `pending`.

**SOT Hardening:** `applyStatusTransition()` → match `'pending'` → `null` (no-op).
